Our Story

A Hub for Fashion
& Fine Accessories

Nestled in the heart of Nurpur Qila, AAR JAY Collections is your destination for exquisite designer clothing, beautiful jewellery, and thoughtful gift items. We bring together the finest from Jaipur and beyond to the doorstep of Himachal Pradesh.

From elegant Jaipuri suits and Kurti Plazo sets to luxurious bed covers, quilts, and blankets — every item in our store is curated with care and love for quality.

4.8Google Rating
100+Products
4+Years Serving
500+Happy Customers
What We Offer

Our Collections

Jaipuri Suits & Kurtis

Finest quality cotton Jaipuri suits, Kurti Plazo sets, and designer ethnic wear that soothes the body and delights the eye.

Starting ₹499 onwards →
Imitation Jewellery

Kundan, oxidised, and vibrant colourful jewellery. Aesthetic pieces that complement every outfit and occasion.

Starting ₹199 onwards →
Handbags & Accessories

Stylish handbags and fashion accessories to complete your look with grace and personality.

Starting ₹299 onwards →
Home Textiles

Premium bed covers, blankets, and quilts — warmth and beauty woven together for your home.

Starting ₹799 onwards →
Gift Items

Thoughtfully curated gift options for every occasion — birthdays, festivals, and celebrations.

Starting ₹199 onwards →
Track Suits

Comfortable and stylish track suits for active and casual wear, for all ages.

Starting ₹599 onwards →
Jewellery Collection

Beautiful &
Aesthetic Jewellery

Our jewellery collection is a celebration of Indian craftsmanship. Each piece is selected to bring out the best in you — from traditional Kundan sets for festive occasions to everyday oxidised pieces with timeless charm.
